subdomain.description: Your BambooHR account subdomain (the <subdomain> in https://<subdomain>.bamboohr.com). Used to derive base_url as https://{subdomain}.bamboohr.com/api/v1.

api_key.description: BambooHR API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username with a literal 'x' password (BambooHR's documented API-key auth convention); never logged.
